% Front cover (typographic only, no graphic) for
% "Một số thuật ngữ trong Toán rời rạc". Compile with xelatex.
\documentclass[11pt]{article}
\usepackage[paperwidth=8.5in,paperheight=11in,margin=0pt]{geometry}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{TeX Gyre Termes}
\setmonofont{TeX Gyre Cursor} % monospace for the GitHub release line
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{fontawesome5} % GitHub mark on the release line
\definecolor{ink}{HTML}{0F2A43}
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{2C7A7B}
\definecolor{gold}{HTML}{C9A227}
\definecolor{paper}{HTML}{F6F8FA}
\definecolor{faint}{HTML}{C3D0DC}
\pagestyle{empty}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
% Release version on the cover: build-print.sh writes cover-version.tex with the
% release tag (RELEASE_VERSION in CI); otherwise default to the build date.
\providecommand{\twodigit}[1]{\ifnum#1<10 0\fi\number#1}
\IfFileExists{cover-version.tex}{\input{cover-version.tex}}{}
\providecommand{\coverversion}{\the\year.\twodigit{\month}.\twodigit{\day}}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}[x=1in,y=1in]
  % background
  \fill[paper] (0,0) rectangle (8.5,11);
  % top title band + accent rules (band extended downward for a larger dark area)
  \fill[ink]    (0,6.7) rectangle (8.5,11);
  \fill[accent] (0,6.56) rectangle (8.5,6.7);
  \fill[gold]   (0,6.50) rectangle (8.5,6.54);
  % gold kicker (the type of book), centred and letter-spaced at the top of the
  % dark band, above the title. Uppercase + tracking rather than small caps,
  % which TeX Gyre Termes does not provide for Vietnamese accents.
  \node[text=gold] at (4.25,10.5)
    {\fontsize{14}{17}\selectfont\addfontfeatures{LetterSpace=16.0}TỪ ĐIỂN CHÚ GIẢI ANH – VIỆT};
  \node[anchor=west, text=white] at (0.85,9.95)
    {\resizebox{7.3in}{!}{Một số thuật ngữ trong Toán rời rạc và Khoa học máy tính}};
  % English title sits as the line immediately under the Vietnamese title (the
  % bilingual pair). The gold gloss line is now the centred kicker at the top.
  \node[anchor=west, text=paper] at (0.85,9.45)
    {\resizebox{6.8in}{!}{Selected Terms in Discrete Mathematics and Computer Science}};
  % editor credit, right-aligned, near the bottom of the (enlarged) dark band.
  \node[anchor=east, text=gold] at (7.65,7.25)
    {\fontsize{15}{18}\selectfont\itshape Người biên soạn};
  \node[anchor=east, text=white] at (7.65,6.95)
    {\fontsize{19}{23}\selectfont Duc A. Hoang (Hoàng Anh Đức)};
  % A–Z typographic motif (the lexicon is ordered A to Z)
  \node[text=faint] at (4.25,5.75)
    {\fontsize{30}{36}\selectfont\bfseries A\,~B\,~C\,~D\,~E\,~F\,~G\,~H\,~I\,~J\,~K\,~L\,~M};
  \node[text=faint] at (4.25,5.05)
    {\fontsize{30}{36}\selectfont\bfseries N\,~O\,~P\,~Q\,~R\,~S\,~T\,~U\,~V\,~W\,~X\,~Y\,~Z};
  % thin gold rule + bilingual sample pairs
  \fill[gold] (2.55,4.35) rectangle (5.95,4.37);
  \node[text=accent] at (4.25,4.02)
    {\fontsize{12}{15}\selectfont graph — đồ thị \;\textbullet\; vertex — đỉnh \;\textbullet\; chromatic number — sắc số};
  \node[text=ink!55] at (4.25,3.66)
    {\fontsize{11}{14}\selectfont\itshape Tra cứu theo bảng chữ cái, đối chiếu Anh\,–\,Việt};
  % bottom band + imprint (date + license; editor credit moved to the top band)
  \fill[accent] (0,1.5) rectangle (8.5,1.56);
  % official Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0 badge (right; bottom-right at y=1.0,
  % height 0.95in*31/88=0.335in, so its vertical centre is y=1.167)
  \node[anchor=south east] at (7.65,1.0) {\includegraphics[width=0.95in]{cc-by-nc-sa.png}};
  % release version (left), mirrored to the badge: same 0.85in margin and the
  % same vertical centre (y=1.167) as the badge.
  \node[anchor=west, text=ink!72] at (0.85,1.167)
    {\fontsize{12}{15}\ttfamily\selectfont \faGithub~Release \coverversion};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
